mentor_recording_item: depth can be converted to normal; depth, point, and normal should be geometrically coupled rather than learned as unrelated heads

implementation.name: normal_from_point_map_supervision
implementation.evidence_lines: compute_normal_loss derives target normals from dense point maps and restricts supervision to valid human masks

implementation.name: depth_to_normal_consistency
implementation.evidence_lines: predicted depth is unprojected to camera points, point_map_to_normal_map builds depth-derived normals, then cosine normal loss compares them with predicted normals

implementation.name: depth_to_point_geometry_chain
implementation.evidence_lines: compute_unproject_geometry_loss differentiably reconstructs world points from predicted depth and predicted camera pose

implementation.name: selfgeom_training_configs
implementation.evidence_lines: depthnormal_coupled, xview_selfgeom, teacherless selfgeom, and depth_point_normal_direct configs enable depth-normal, depth-point, point-normal, and cross-view consistency variants

effect_vs_without.positive: normal-depth-point consistency metrics improved in earlier r2/r3/r16 evaluations
effect_vs_without.negative: same-protocol 6-view Open3D face/head point cloud did not reliably beat the signfix/reference visual gate
effect_vs_without.v50r2_claim: self-geometry is used as auxiliary consistency/audit evidence; it is not the sole source of V50R2 strict candidate pass and it is not an independent teacher
